title: gratiola neglecta var. glaberrima
intro: Gratiola neglecta var. glaberrima, also known as American balm or blue skullcap, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gratiola neglecta var. glaberrima include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for herbal use, with some studies also suggesting its potential as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
